title: Ryoamium
description: Add Ryoanmic Lights options to Embeddium options page
body:
Simply add [Ryoamic Lights](https://www.modrinth.com/mod/ryoamiclights) options to [Embeddium](https://www.modrinth.com/mod/embeddium) options page so that you can easily configure all of your video options in just one page.
![Options Page](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8546f660469585625cd826fe2628c589e2a38994.jpeg)
